name: latifolia-solutions-site
description: Latifolia Solutions – Cybersecurity and AI Security product development consulting website (static export for GitHub Pages)

scripts.export: rm -rf docs && mkdir -p docs && cp -R out/* docs/ && touch docs/.nojekyll && sh -c 'test -f CNAME && cp -f CNAME docs/CNAME || true' 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p docs/assets && cp -R public/assets/* docs/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
